# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- Prefer responses in Spanish.
- Maintain DDD encapsulation and existing solution logic (use private setters and domain methods).
- Keep EF Core compatibility.
- When reloading list data, do not reset pagination; preserve currentPage unless it becomes out-of-range.
- Do not reset the current page; preserve pagination unless it becomes out-of-range.

## Code Style
- Use specific formatting rules.
- Follow naming conventions.
